title: Skill Request
description: A pending create/update request for a skill, submitted via the Port UI and routed through review before it is applied to the live skill catalog.

skill_content.title: SKILL.md Content
skill_content.description: The proposed full SKILL.md content (the main skill file)

files.title: Additional Files
files.description: Supporting files that make up the skill (references, scripts, assets, other). SKILL.md itself lives in skill_content.

create_method.title: Create Method
create_method.description: How the author produced this draft

ai_prompt.title: AI Prompt
ai_prompt.description: The prompt used when the draft was generated with AI (if applicable)

change_summary.title: What Changed?
change_summary.description: Short human summary of the proposed change

skill_path.title: Skill Path
skill_path.description: GitLab file path (for synced skills) or Port entity URI (for UI-created skills)

target_skill_files.title: Target Skill Files
target_skill_files.description: The existing skill_file entities being updated (empty for create requests). On approval the automation creates new skill_file entities and links them here.

skill_group.title: Skill Group
skill_group.description: The group that owns this skill; its owning team are the reviewers
